reason: Enabling the dracut FIPS module modifies the initramfs to enforce FIPS mode, which is not supported on an already installed system and can render the system unbootable or cause loss of access. The policy explicitly classifies FIPS-related changes as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; Potential boot failure; Loss of SSH/console access; System-wide cryptographic changes; Non‑supported configuration on existing installations
